recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace

recommendations.title: Returner
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the future forces a local gunman to help her stop an impending alien invasion which will wipe out the human race.

recommendations.title: Liquid Sky
recommendations.overview: An alien creature invades New York's punk subculture in its search for an opiate released by the brain during an orgasm.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.
